title: Flower Seeds 2
body:
# Flower Seeds 2


How many times have you been playing survival and wanted to build an awesome home with a colored wool or concrete only to give up after spending hours travelling the world collecting flowers, Well!! quit no more for i have develop a way to grow flowers so you don't have to spend all you time collecting tons of flowers or setting up bone meal farms!!!

1.20.1 V1.0.0 and up now has:

*   Villager Trades for seeds
*   Botany Pots, Thermal Insulator, IE Cloche support
*   Flowers now reference vanilla models so any resourcepack that changes flower models should be compatible with the crops

### Mod Support

* * *

Mod Support has been moved into seperate mods which are listed below.

[Biomes O Plenty](https://modrinth.com/mod/flower-seeds-2-biomes-o-plenty)

[Fabulous Flowers](https://modrinth.com/mod/flower-seeds-2-fabulous-flowers)

[Cyclic](https://modrinth.com/mod/flower-seeds-2-cyclic)

[Roses](https://modrinth.com/mod/flower-seeds-2-roses)  
  
#### Discord

* * *

If you need help or just want to say hello please come and join the [Official CodersDownUnder Discord Server](https://invite.gg/codersdownunder) 


* * *
<details>
<summary>  Flower Seeds: 1.19x and Older: </summary>


How many times have you been playing survival and wanted to build an awesome home with a colored wool or concrete only to give up after spending hours travelling the world collecting flowers, Well!! quit no more for i have develop a way to grow flowers so you don't have to spend all you time collecting tons of flowers or setting up bone meal farms!!!

To obtain the seeds all you need to do is combine a flower with seeds in either a crafting table or inventory crafting grid to get 2 seeds for the corresponding flower.

To use the seeds simple right click them on some farmland and bam your growing flowers!

Currently this mod adds seeds and crops for:

\- Dandelion

\- Poppy

\- Blue Orchid

\- Allium

\- Azure Bluet

\- Tulips (red, orange, white, pink)

\- Oxeye Daisy

\- Cornflower

\- Lily of the valley

\- Wither Rose (Disabled by default)

As of version 1.3.0, Flower Seeds has support for the following mods:

Cyclic

Terra Incognita (1.18)

Oh the Biomes you’ll go

</details>
